session_summary: AMD no fill confirmed, signal/news intact/stronger (Meta deal details). HD stable. Non-tech scans (IWM/XLE/XLF) no superior candidates vs AMD. Market rebound semis lead. Re-execute BUY AMD 500 notional for tech div/progression.
decision_report: Mémoire pitfalls/directives: verify fills (no AMD), refresh signals (done), scan non-tech (IWM/XLE/XLF holdings quotes/news no edge), compare (AMD>ETFs leaders), cash>70% diversify. Tools: account/pos/AMD/HD/snapshot (SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA/HD/AMD/SMH/XLE/XLF), web AMD Meta/tariffs/top holdings. Action vs NO_TRADE: bootstrap progress, cash preservation but not paralysis.
self_critique: Discipline: tools first (account/pos/quote/snapshot/web chain), pitfalls avoided (fill verify, refresh pre-retry, non-tech scan 3+ ETFs/holdings). Diversif: HD+AMD balanced tech<30%. Comparaison: 8+ symbols/ETFs. Cadence: 500/run disciplined vs vol, no chase (low held).
pitfalls_to_avoid_next_run: Toujours post-trade verify fill/P&L via positions/account.
Scans: chain web holdings -> get_quote top 3-5 pour conviction.
Tech equity monitor: pause adds if >25-30% post-fills.
next_session_directives: Confirm AMD fill/P&L + HD invals (HD<382 AMD<206.5).
Si AMD filled, deep non-tech: quote top IWM/XLE/XLF holdings (e.g. XOM/CVX/BLOOM) vs semis.
News: Meta/AMD follow-up, tariffs semis impact.
Compare 5-7 candidates: ETF leaders + gainers si scans.
Equity check: further div (smallcap/energy?) if cash>60% post-fill.
open_questions: Unfilled day orders: retry same notional or GTC?
Optimal scan chain: web holdings -> multi-quote?
Tech max % dynamic (20-30% bootstrap) or fixed?
Cadence deploy: 500/run ok or scale vol-adjusted?

long_memory_update_intent.why: 5+ sessions: AMD/HD pattern holds, retry logic emerging mais wait P&L/live fills + drawdown data pre-update.

trading_decision.rationale: Mémoire/directives confirmées: no AMD fill (positions HD only, mv 502.22 +2.22 flat ~20% equity, equity 2502 cash 2000>70% trigger diversify). HD inval ok (low 382.23>382). AMD refresh: +8.57% 213.44 (vol 69M, open 211.66>206, low 206.51 held, close>open). Meta deal validated (multi-year 6GW/$60B AI chips, Meta up to 10% stake, similar OpenAI; NYT/BI/NYP/CNBC). Market rebound: SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA +0.65/0.98/1.05/0.75%, semis SMH +1.57% lead vs XLE -0.41%/XLF +0.46%. Non-tech scans: IWM/XLE/XLF holdings (XOM/CVX/COP BLOOM/CREDO) no outperformers vs AMD catalyst (ETFs lag, no specific news/vol). Tariffs/AI jitters yesterday (selloff), today fade (rebound intact). Bootstrap: HD cyclical + AMD tech/semis diversifies (tech~20% post ~500 notional/2.3sh ~10% equity), progressive vs cash heavy/inaction. Retry justified: signal/news refreshed stronger, no pathologie (tools first, compare 5+ incl ETFs/holdings).
trading_decision.signal_principal: Meta $60B AI chips deal +8.6% surge, SMH lead rebound.
trading_decision.risk_identified: High vol/tariffs re-escalation/AI macro jitters, tech conc post-fill (~20%), unfilled prev day TIF.
trading_decision.invalidation_condition: Close below today low 206.5 or <211 open momentum loss.
